productName: Ooowee - JUICED 5/1G Infused PreRoll - Ghost Berry - Crunch Berries - 5g
description: This infused hybrid pre-roll wraps Crunch Berriez flower around a concentrate boost (think kief, hash, distillate, or diamonds) for a louder aroma and a longer session. More potent than flower alone, with more intense effects — with notes of berry, apricot, and blueberry, delivering a versatile, anytime balance. Pace yourself.
